evals.prompt: Start the app so I can test it locally
evals.expected_output: Both backend server (port 8000) and frontend server (port 5173) are running and accessible. The app loads at http://localhost:5173

evals.prompt: Launch the painting analysis app - I need to test uploading a painting
evals.expected_output: Backend and frontend servers are both running and ready. User can navigate to http://localhost:5173 and see the upload interface

evals.prompt: Run the server so I can develop on the frontend
evals.expected_output: Both servers are running with hot reload enabled. Frontend changes will auto-refresh in the browser, backend Python changes will auto-reload
